findings.evidence: `rg "innerProductCore.*invariant|@inner ℝ V .*innerProductCore" code/TauCeti` only finds `TameMetric.lean:146` and `CompatibleMetric.lean:177`; the raw lemma is `TameMetric.lean:67`, so users of the `InnerProductSpace.Core` must unfold/change representation to use it.
findings.fix: Add the packaged inner-product invariance lemma, preferably `[simp]`, proved by changing to `ω.symmetrizedBilinForm J` and using `symmetrizedBilinForm_invariant`.
findings.issue: `Tames.innerProductCore` is advertised as the `J`-invariant metric, but the public API only gives `innerProductCore_inner`; there is no lemma stating `@inner ℝ V h.innerProductCore.toInner (J v) (J w) = @inner ℝ V h.innerProductCore.toInner v w`.

summary: The raw bilinear form API is mostly present, but the packaged tame inner product does not expose the advertised `J`-invariance needed by downstream users.
